data.biography: Devi or Atom Deviyabha Uddhachandra, born in Bangkok, Thailand, is an actress and member of the girl group Cosmos and the sub-unit CYGNUS under Star Hunter Entertainment (สตาร์ ฮันเตอร์ เอ็นเตอร์เทนเม้นท์). She studied at Bangkok University's School of Digital Media and Cinematic Arts.
data.name: Deviyabha Uddhachandra
